headline: Qnity Electronics Stock Trends After Hours: CEO Tells Jim Cramer Company 'Right At The Center' Of Materials Innovation, The 'Hidden Hero' Of AI Era
summary: Qnity Electronics shares rose 2.85% after hours as investors reacted to the CEO’s upbeat comments on AI-driven semiconductor demand.
